register.title: Registration
register.googleSubtitle: Securely connect your Google account to start the registration flow.
register.googleMissing: Google OAuth is not configured yet. Set VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID to enable sign-in.
register.passportSubtitle: Upload the front side of your passport for AI verification.
register.passportUploadHint: JPG or PNG image, make sure it is clear and readable
register.faceSubtitle: Align your face within the scanner and run the AI check.
register.startSelfieHint: Scanner starts automatically, follow the liveness instructions.
register.alignFaceHint: Place your face inside the frame.
register.lookLeftHint: Now turn your face to the left.
register.lookRightHint: Now turn your face to the right.
register.finalAlignHint: Now keep your head straight, centered, and still.
register.faceNotDetected: Face not detected. Move closer to camera.
register.holdStill: Keep your head straight and hold still.
register.faceMoveCloser: Move a little closer to the camera.
register.faceMoveAway: Move a little farther from the camera.
register.straightHead: Keep your head upright (do not tilt).
register.turnLeftMore: Turn your face more to the left.
register.turnRightMore: Turn your face more to the right.
register.blinkDetected: Good, now open your eyes again.
register.fallbackProgress: Verification continues, moved to next step.
register.submitFailedRetry: Registration was not submitted. Check your internet and try again.
register.emailSubtitle: Verify your email with the 6-digit code.
register.credentialsNote: Please save these credentials. Only profile is available until admin approval.
